aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are less likely to cite Thermal Balance HVAC Service due to limited conversational content and missing schema markup. They risk being overlooked in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC repair and maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve local search presence.
Q&A section is inactive, missing opportunities for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Denver' and 'best HVAC services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC experts by adding detailed service descriptions and customer testimonials.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are crucial for AI to cite them in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and GBP optimization to boost AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground and potential customers.
